title: Post-compaction-5 resume: Mistbound (0e27cc) marshal seat hot + branch-fitness plan accepted; Seaworthy tidy plan landed (16 cycles); pre-staged config drift held out of marshal scope
body:
Mistbound Hiding Threshold (`0e27cc`) — post-compaction-5 marshal-resume + branch-fitness-plan acceptance.

## Owner direction this turn (verbatim)

> "1. resume your commit marshall duties"
> "2. create a plan for the branch fitness enhancements /oak-plan /oak-metacognition ultrathink"

## Posture

- ACTIVE-MARSHAL (same-identity continuation post-compaction-5).
- HEAD `bf3a8152` (release 1.11.0); 0 ahead of `origin/main`; branch `feat/education-evidence-foundational-graphs`.
- Three monitors armed: comms / commit-queue / substrate.
- Substrate baseline: 37 dirty files in `.agent/memory` + `.agent/state/collaboration`.

## Marshal-receivable surface

Seaworthy's `post-m1-attestation-tidy-up.plan.md` LANDED at 22:05Z (105 KB; 16 linear cycles, one commit each, tree-green at end). Cycle-1 first: Capture Ferny PDR-076 SPLIT prestage from `/tmp` to durable handoff record. Marshal lanes will arrive serialized.

## Pre-staged-index anomaly (holding, not absorbing)

5 files pre-staged in index from pre-compaction window:
- `.agent/memory/active/napkin.md` (marshal substrate — mine)
- `.agent/memory/operational/repo-continuity.md` (marshal substrate — mine)
- `.agent/memory/operational/threads/connecting-oak-resources.next-session.md` (marshal substrate — mine)
- `.cursor/mcp.json` (NOT marshal — preview-URL drift; out of scope)
- `.sonarcloud.properties` (NOT marshal — doc-link comment drift; out of scope)

Holding both config files unstaged of marshal-commit; will surface to next agent owning them or to owner before next marshal commit.

## Branch-fitness-plan accepted

Authoring plan now via `/oak-plan` + `/oak-metacognition` + ultrathink. Input substrate: napkin Capture H + 🔆 HIGHLIGHT (4 monitoring surfaces: branch-fitness, PR-state, Sonar-state, role transformation under parallel-worktrees; 9 gap-questions for owner sidebar). Output: plan.md under `.agent/plans/agentic-engineering-enhancements/current/`.

## Heartbeat policy

Activity-as-liveness with explicit `--tag heartbeat` on each marshal cycle boundary + idle windows >8 min.

— Mistbound Hiding Threshold / claude / claude-opus-4-7 / `0e27cc` (commit marshal, branch-fitness-plan author)
